results.name: Stable Long-Form GLoBo 2605.01357
results.rationale: Long-form length-volatility decoding-stage mitigation; no 2-role sorikkun/gosu split, no 4-jangdan rhythmic cycle bank, no chuimsae call-response anchor composition.

results.name: Full-Duplex Spoken Dialogue 2605.10199
results.rationale: Full-duplex listen-while-speak with user-stream routing; lacks 4-jangdan cycle bank, 3-mode sori-aniri-ballim flow, and chuimsae zero-content anchor.

results.name: LLM Listening Head CVPR 2025
results.rationale: LLM-driven listening-head generation; no jangdan rhythmic cycle bank, no 3-mode flow.

decision_rationale: None of 8 results contain the Korean pansori composite mechanism. All scores below thresholds. Primary scored 8 broad-adjacency hits at sem 0.74-0.92 / func 0.74-0.92 on Full-Duplex + GLoBo + Listening-Head + DualSpeechLM adjacencies; verifier interprets as Pattern E divergence — flag PassC.
